title: Two Sum I (Basic)
description:
Given an array of integers and a target, find the indices of two numbers that add up to target.
Input: n (size of array), followed by n integers, followed by target.
Output: space-separated indices.

title: Two Sum II (Sorted)
description:
Given a sorted array of integers and a target, find indices of two numbers that add up to target. Use O(n) time and O(1) space.
Input: n, followed by n integers, target.
Output: 1-indexed space-separated indices.

title: 3Sum
description:
Find all unique triplets in the array which gives the sum of zero.
Input: n, followed by n integers.
Output: The number of unique triplets that sum to 0.

title: Search I (Linear)
description:
Find an element in an array and return its index. If not found, return -1.
Input: n, n integers, target.
Output: index

title: Search II (Binary)
description:
Find an element in a SORTED array. Must be O(log n).
Input: n, n integers, target.
Output: index or -1.

title: Search III (Rotated)
description:
Find an element in a rotated sorted array in O(log n).
Input: n, n integers, target.
Output: index or -1.

title: Strings I (Reverse)
description:
Reverse a single string.
Input: string without spaces.
Output: reversed string.

title: Strings II (Words)
description:
Reverse the order of words in a sentence.
Input: string of words.
Output: reversed words.

title: Strings III (Palindromic Substring)
description:
Return the length of the longest palindromic substring in s.
Input: string s.
Output: length.

title: Steps I (Climbing)
description:
You are climbing a staircase. It takes n steps to reach top. Each time you can either climb 1 or 2 steps. In how many distinct ways can you climb to the top?
Input: n
Output: ways

title: Steps II (Min Cost)
description:
You are given an integer array cost where cost[i] is the cost of ith step. Find minimum cost to reach top.
Input: n, followed by n costs.
Output: min cost

title: Steps III (K Steps)
description:
You can climb up to K steps at a time to reach N stairs. How many ways? Output modulo 1000000007.
Input: N K
Output: ways

title: Stocks I (One Trade)
description:
Given prices array, find max profit by choosing a single day to buy and a different day in the future to sell.
Input: n, n prices.
Output: map profit

title: Stocks II (Many Trades)
description:
Find max profit. You can buy and sell on the same day, but must sell before buying again. Multiple trades allowed.
Input: n, n prices.
Output: total profit

title: Stocks III (Two Trades)
description:
Find max profit. You may complete at most two transactions.
Input: n, n prices.
Output: max profit
